healthReason: v2.10.2 published without Go kernel binaries (#1316 — OPEN, 2nd+ cycle). PR #1303 (KE-2 implementation) merge conflict persists. Senior unassigned on KE-3 issues — no PRs opened yet for bootstrap hardening work.
summary: Steady-state KE-3 cycle. Sprint transition from KE-2 is complete. No new PRs merged this cycle. PR #1303 (Go kernel delegation) remains conflicting after 2+ cycles — re-flagged for senior rebase. KE-3 issues (#1316, #1341, #1325, #1332, #1322) all open with no PRs yet. Senior assignment updated to prioritize #1316 (v2.10.3 patch) and #1325/#1332 (guide-mode mkdir block).

notableIssues.title: v2.10.2 Go kernel binaries missing from npm package
notableIssues.label: bug
notableIssues.note: v2.10.2 shipped without Go binaries — Go build failed before PR #1315 fix landed. All users fall back to TS kernel (no crash, but 100x latency win lost). Needs v2.10.3 patch. P0 — primary KE-3 blocker. 2+ cycles with no PR.
